title: Add tests for rule-influenced expectations (if applicable)
summary: Add targeted tests that validate behaviors influenced by updated .rules guidance for tx_event_append and tx_state_save inputs.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover rule-influenced expectations for required tool inputs.
At least one test exercises an init scenario impacted by .rules guidance.
Tests align with tool schemas and initialization behavior.

steps.description: Identify behaviors that should be validated based on updated .rules.
Add or update tests that confirm required inputs for tx_event_append/tx_state_save.
Verify tests align with initialization handling and do not weaken validation.

notes: Keep tests minimal and focused on rule-influenced expectations.
If no executable rules validation exists, document rationale and skip with justification.
